title: ludwigia repens var. rotundata
intro: Ludwigia repens var. rotundata, also known as Round-leaved Water Willow or Round-leaved Ludwigia, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the evening primrose family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ludwigia repens var. rotundata include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Ludwigia repens var. rotundata is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, and is also used in modern medicine to develop new treatments and therapies.
